ui.reviewSubtitle: Take a moment to review this app before you install.
ui.meta.interface.label: Interface
ui.meta.interface.tooltip: How this app is intended to be used on your system.
ui.meta.homepage.tooltip: The app's official website for product information.
ui.meta.support.tooltip: Where to get help, report bugs, or contact maintainers.
ui.meta.license.tooltip: The legal terms for using this app.
ui.meta.trust.tooltip: Whether Yambuck could verify the package publisher signature.
ui.meta.entrypoint.label: Entrypoint
ui.meta.entrypoint.tooltip: The internal command Yambuck uses to launch the installed app.
ui.meta.cliCommand.label: CLI command
ui.meta.cliCommand.tooltip: Command to run in Terminal for this package's CLI mode.
ui.meta.cliUsage.label: CLI usage
ui.meta.cliUsage.tooltip: Developer-provided hint for using this package in Terminal.
ui.meta.target.label: Target
ui.meta.target.tooltip: Resolved package target selected for this system.
ui.meta.payloadRoot.label: Payload root
ui.meta.payloadRoot.tooltip: Package folder selected for host payload extraction.
ui.meta.launchPath.label: Launch path
ui.meta.launchPath.tooltip: The resolved executable path that Yambuck tries to run.
ui.meta.entrypointComplete.tooltip: The launch command path declared by the package manifest.
ui.meta.manifest.tooltip: Manifest schema version for this package.
ui.meta.appId.tooltip: Stable identifier used by Yambuck for ownership and updates.
ui.meta.appUuid.tooltip: Immutable app identity UUID set by the publisher.
ui.meta.packageUuid.tooltip: Unique UUID for this specific package build artifact.
ui.meta.configPath.label: Config path
ui.meta.configPath.tooltip: Optional config path from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
ui.meta.cachePath.label: Cache path
ui.meta.cachePath.tooltip: Optional cache path from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
ui.meta.tempPath.label: Temp path
ui.meta.tempPath.tooltip: Optional temp path from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
ui.terminalAppBody: This package installs a command-line app. It does not open a desktop window. Open Terminal and run the command shown below after install.
ui.openPackageSubtitlePrimary: Looks like there was an issue opening this .yambuck file.
ui.openPackageSubtitleSecondary: Something in this package file looks invalid or incomplete. Ask the app publisher for an updated package, then try again.
ui.choosePackageSubtitle: Open a package file to start.
ui.trustSubtitle: Review publisher verification before you continue.
ui.verifiedPublisherBody: This package is signed by a trusted publisher.
ui.unverifiedPublisherBody: This publisher could not be verified. Only continue if you trust this source.
ui.licenseSubtitle: Review the license and accept it to continue.
ui.licenseMissingBody: This package requires a license, but no license text was provided. Installation can't continue.
ui.licenseAcceptedLabel: I have read and accept this package license.
ui.licenseRequiredBody: The publisher requires license acceptance before install can continue.
ui.installScopeSubtitle: Choose who can use this app.
ui.reinstallScopeSubtitle: Choose reinstall behavior and who can use this app.
ui.updateScopeSubtitle: Choose update behavior and who can use this app.
ui.downgradeScopeSubtitle: Choose downgrade behavior and who can use this app.
ui.otherScopeBody: You already have version {version} installed in {scope}.
ui.scopeDecisionSubtitle: Review what will happen in this scope before install continues.
ui.confirmDowngrade: I understand downgrade risks and have confirmed this app supports downgrading from {existingVersion} to {incomingVersion}.
ui.removeExistingData: Remove existing app settings, cache, and temp data before reinstall.
ui.confirmDeleteData: I understand this permanently deletes existing app data.
ui.optionsSubtitle: Choose any install options for this app.
ui.noOptionsBody: There are no install options for this app.
ui.invalidOptionsBody: Some options need attention before you continue.
ui.installFailedSubtitle: Something went wrong while installing this app.
ui.installFailedDetailsSubtitle: You can review details below and try again.
decision.message.newInstall: This app is ready to install.
decision.message.update: Looks like you already have this app installed. If you continue, Yambuck will update it from version {existingVersion} to {incomingVersion}.
decision.message.reinstall: Looks like you already have this app installed. If you continue, Yambuck will reinstall version {incomingVersion}.
decision.message.downgrade: Looks like you already have this app installed. If you continue, Yambuck will downgrade it from version {existingVersion} to {incomingVersion}. Data or settings created by the newer version may not be compatible after downgrade.
decision.message.blockedIdentityMismatch: This package can't be installed because it conflicts with an app already installed on this system.
toast.noPreflightReport: No compatibility report is available yet.
toast.filePickerUnavailable: Couldn't open the file picker. Check app permissions and try again.
toast.startupPackageOpenFailed: Couldn't open the startup package argument.
toast.finishCurrentInstallFirst: Finish or cancel the current install before opening another package.
toast.workflowMissing: Install session missing. Reopen the package and try again.
toast.invalidOptions: Some options need attention before you continue.
toast.installFailed: Install failed. Review details and try again.
toast.installSucceededRefreshWarning: Install succeeded, but the app list couldn't refresh yet.
toast.confirmDowngradeToContinue: Confirm downgrade risk acknowledgment to continue.
toast.removeExistingFailed: Couldn't remove the existing install before reinstall.
scope.user.title: Just for me
scope.system.title: All users
mock.decisionUpdate: Looks like this app is already installed. If you continue, Yambuck will update it.
mock.packagePickerDisabled: Mock package picker is disabled in UI Lab.
mock.releaseChannelRequired: Please choose a release channel before continuing.
mock.installFailureSummary: Mock install failed at validation stage.
mock.installFailureDetails: This is mock-only failure output for UI verification.
